name: Kolibri
description: Offline-first learning platform from Learning Equality — self-hosted STEM and literacy content for ages 5-18. Classroom-capable, LAN-sync built in, thousands of free educational channels curated by the global learning community.
author: Crow

env_vars.name: KOLIBRI_URL
env_vars.description: Internal URL for reaching the Kolibri API.

env_vars.name: KOLIBRI_DATA_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path to persist Kolibri content and SQLite DB (defaults to a named volume).

env_vars.name: KOLIBRI_HTTP_PORT
env_vars.description: Host port to expose Kolibri on. Default 8085 (Kolibri's own default 8080 is a common conflict on home servers).

env_vars.name: KOLIBRI_FACILITY_NAME
env_vars.description: Optional default facility name displayed on first run. First-run setup wizard is otherwise completed in the web UI.

notes: First-run setup (admin account + facility) is completed in the Kolibri web UI at http://<host>:<KOLIBRI_HTTP_PORT>/. Once configured, channels can be imported from Kolibri Studio or from a LAN peer. Sized for a Raspberry Pi 4 (512 MB floor); a full primary-grade STEM bundle typically imports 5-10 GB of channels. Kolibri has LAN-sync built in — two instances on the same network auto-discover each other for offline classrooms.
